promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest admission and authority signals from a highly recursive stitched export.
They preserve comparison value against the prior grok TOE quarantine batch without promoting unified-physics closure rhetoric.
They stay fully source-linked to existing intake artifacts without requiring a fresh raw-doc pass.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These clusters remain too rhetoric-heavy, theorem-closure-heavy, or evidence-injection-heavy for narrower reuse.
The parent file repeatedly mixes provenance and overstates closure, so these items should stay explicit quarantine material.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the prior grok TOE A2-mid batch as a comparison anchor, not as ontology endorsement.
